mapper.sql: spsId, studentId, classId, coachId, orderNo, className, classTime,classDate, classroom, classplaceId, askNumber, buyNumber, classStatus, createdDate, price, duration, validityDate
mapper.select: select studentId, classId, coachId, orderNo, className, askNumber, buyNumber, price, duration, validityDate from stu_privateclass_ship where spsId = #{spsId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.insert: insert into stu_privateclass_ship (spsId, studentId, classId, coachId, askNumber, buyNumber, classStatus, createdDate) values (#{spsId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{studentId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{classId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{coachId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{askNumber,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{buyNumber,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{classStatus,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

insert into stu_privateclass_ship
spsId,
studentId,
classId,
coachId,
orderType,
orderNo,
askNumber,
buyNumber,
classStatus,
createdDate,
className,
energy,
price,
duration,
validityDate,
#{spsId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{studentId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{classId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{coachId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{orderType,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{askNumber,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{buyNumber,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{classStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{className,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{energy,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
#{price,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
#{duration,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
#{validityDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update stu_privateclass_ship
studentId = #{studentId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
classId = #{classId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
coachId = #{coachId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
askNumber = #{askNumber,jdbcType=INTEGER},
buyNumber = #{buyNumber,jdbcType=INTEGER},
classStatus = #{classStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER},
createdDate = #{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where spsId = #{spsId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update stu_privateclass_ship set studentId = #{studentId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, classId = #{classId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, coachId = #{coachId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, askNumber = #{askNumber,jdbcType=INTEGER}, buyNumber = #{buyNumber,jdbcType=INTEGER}, classStatus = #{classStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER}, createdDate = #{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where spsId = #{spsId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: select sps.spsId, sps.studentId, sps.classId, sps.coachId, co.coachName, co.grade, co.headImgUrl, co.phone, sps.className, sps.askNumber, sps.buyNumber, sps.classStatus, ui.rongCloudId, ui.rongCloudToken, date_format(sps.validityDate, '%Y-%m-%d') as classValidityDay from stu_privateclass_ship sps left join coach co on co.coachId = sps.coachId left join user_info ui on ui.userId = co.userId where sps.studentId = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT} order by sps.createdDate desc LIMIT #{offset},${limit}
select count(*) from stu_privateclass_ship sps left join coach co on co.coachId = sps.coachId left join user_info ui on ui.userId = co.userId where sps.studentId = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT u.nickname, u.headImgUrl, u.sex, u.rongCloudId, u.rongCloudToken, u.phone, u.userId, a.className, a.classPlace, a.classStatus, a.classTime FROM arrange_class a LEFT JOIN user_info u ON a.studentId = u.userId WHERE a.coachId = #{coachId}
mapper.update: update stu_privateclass_ship set askNumber = askNumber-1, classplaceId = #{storeAddrId}, classroom = #{storeName}, classTime = #{dataTime}, classDate = #{dataJsonArray}, createdDate = now() where spsId = #{spsId, jdbcType=BIGINT}
update stu_privateclass_ship set askNumber = askNumber+1, createdDate = now() where spsId = (select spsId from arrange_class where arrangeClassId = #{arrangeClassId})
mapper.select: select sps.spsId, sps.orderNo, sps.className, sps.coachId, co.userId, sps.studentId, sps.price, (sps.buyNumber - sps.askNumber) as restClassNum, (sps.buyNumber - sps.askNumber) * price as totalMoney from stu_privateclass_ship sps left join coach co on co.coachId = sps.coachId where TIMESTAMPDIFF(DAY, date_add(str_to_date(sps.validityDate, '%Y-%m-%d'), interval ifnull(sps.duration,0) minute), date_format(now(),'%Y-%m-%d'))>1 and sps.askNumber < sps.buyNumber
mapper.update: update stu_privateclass_ship set classStatus = #{classStatus}, createdDate = now() where spsId = #{spsId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
